use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in landing pages and marketing sites
Interactive button with mouse-following glow effect for engagement
Glassmorphic buttons with backdrop blur for modern UI themes
CTA buttons in hero sections requiring subtle animation
Generic interactive button component for any SaaS or product site
ai_summary: A glassmorphic animated button component featuring a mouse-following gradient glow effect with backdrop blur and semi-transparent styling. The button has a pulsing animation and responds to hover with increased opacity and border brightness. Uses a multi-color gradient (indigo, purple, pink) with blur effects for a modern, premium aesthetic.
